# machin-web-ui

> agent-first design system for isomorphic machin apps: scaffold + vendor components + a pure-MFL Tailwind engine, one static binary, no Node

Version 0.2.0. The binary is the source of truth — everything here is
`machin-web-ui guide` / `coverage` / `list` output. Repo:
https://github.com/javimosch/machin-web-ui · live gallery: https://javimosch.github.io/machin-web-ui/

## Install

```
curl -L https://github.com/javimosch/machin-web-ui/releases/latest/download/machin-web-ui-linux-amd64 -o machin-web-ui
chmod +x machin-web-ui && sudo mv machin-web-ui /usr/local/bin/
```

Also needs `machin` and `zig` on PATH for `build.sh`. The shipped app binary
has zero runtime dependencies.

## Journey

- init a themed app
- add components (vendored source you own)
- write Tailwind classes in .src
- css to (re)generate the stylesheet
- check/coverage before shipping a class
- build.sh -> native server + wasm client

## Verbs

- `init [dir]` — scaffold an isomorphic app (SSR machweb server + reactive wasm client + starter components + theme.json); builds out of the box
- `add <name...>` — vendor component source into ./components/ (you own it, edit it)
- `list` — component registry (name+description JSON)
- `css [paths] [-o f] [--no-preflight] [--dark-class] [--theme t.json]` — scan .src/.mfl/.html/.js for classes -> stylesheet; '-' reads an explicit class list on stdin
- `check <class...>` — resolve each class to its CSS rule (JSON); unknown => known:false
- `coverage` — the implemented Tailwind surface + honest notImplemented list (JSON)
- `theme init|check <f>|ramp <#hex>` — verified theming: semantic token ramps, oracle-diffed vs tailwind.config
- `verify [--url u] [--port p] [--shot f.png]` — drive headless Chrome over CDP in pure MFL: assert the app renders, the stylesheet applied, no JS errors, hydration slots present; optional screenshot. Exit 1 on failure. (Chrome is a dev dependency.)
- `guide` — this, as JSON (verbs, contracts, gotchas, full component catalog)
- `skill` — prints a SKILL.md for self-installation into an agent runtime

## Contracts

- **isomorphic**: a component is one MFL func; the server calls it for SSR, the wasm client calls the SAME func inside hydrate() and binds to matching data-s slots — no re-render, no drift
- **clicks**: a data-action=x button calls export func x(arg); data-input=x forwards input events to export func x(value); add behavior = add an export + a data-attr
- **slots**: slot(name, fn) emits <span data-s=name>; the client patches it via dom_patch; the SSR server renders the same span so hydration reuses it
- **reRender**: for markup-level (not text) updates call dom_mount(containerId, html) directly from client code (calendar/table/chips/toasts do this)
- **theming**: components speak semantic tokens (canvas surface ink muted line accent ok warn danger info); theme.json remaps them; the default theme aliases the stone look
- **dynamicClassTrap**: the scanner sees LITERAL class strings only — never build class names by interpolation (h-[${n}] wont be scanned); for data-driven geometry use inline SVG attributes or inline style

## Gotchas

- peer-checked: styled element must be a SIBLING of the sr-only input, not nested
- a data-action on a <label> fires twice per click (label forwards a synthetic click to its input) — put it on the input
- unknown classes in an explicit list are reported loud in a /* tw-unknown */ header; in file-scan mode they skip silently (Tailwind JIT semantics)

## Optional

- Full operator manual: https://github.com/javimosch/machin-web-ui/blob/main/AGENTS.md
- llms-full.txt (this + the complete component catalog + AGENTS.md)
- Vision / north star: https://github.com/javimosch/machin-web-ui/blob/main/docs/VISION.md
- The language (machin/MFL): https://github.com/javimosch/machin


---

## Component catalog (60)

- **accordion** — FAQ-style disclosure, no JS: native <details>/<summary>, `ui_accordion_item(q, a); ui_accordion(items)`
- **alert** — inline banner with a colored left accent. Kinds: "info", `ui_alert_classes(kind); ui_alert(kind, title, body)`
- **avatar** — initials on a muted disc (no external images: self-contained `ui_avatar(initials, kind); ui_badge_tint(kind); ui_avatar_img(src, alt); ui_avatar_stack(initials_list)`
- **badge** — pill status badge: tiny uppercase type on a pale pastel wash. `ui_badge_classes(kind); ui_badge(label, kind)`
- **banner** — page-top announcement bar with a dismiss button (toggle the `ui_banner(id, text, dismiss_action)`
- **breadcrumb** — path trail with "/" separators; the last item is the `ui_breadcrumb(labels, hrefs)`
- **button** — flat minimalist button. Variants: "primary" (solid ink), `ui_button_classes(variant); ui_button(label, variant, action)`
- **calendar** — custom month-grid picker with RANGE selection. Pure view: a `ui_calendar(y, m, sel_start, sel_end)`
- **card** — flat bento card: white surface, hairline border, crisp radius, `ui_card_classes(); ui_card(title, body)`
- **chart** — dependency-free charts as inline SVG generated in pure MFL: `ui_sparkline(values); ui_bars(values, labels); ui_donut(pct, caption)`
- **chat** — agent conversation transcript: user messages right-aligned on `ui_chat_msg(role, text); ui_chat(items)`
- **checkbox** — custom checkbox, no JS: a visually-hidden native input (sr-only `ui_check_svg(); ui_checkbox(name, label, checked)`
- **chips** — removable tag chips. Each × carries data-action=`remove_action` `ui_chip(label, idx, remove_action); ui_chips(labels, remove_action)`
- **code_block** — command/code display: ink-on-bone block with an optional `ui_code_block(title, code); ui_code(code)`
- **combobox** — form-shaped autocomplete: a text input over a filtered `ui_combobox(name, placeholder, options, value)`
- **command_palette** — the ctrl-K overlay: a search input over a command `ui_command_palette(id, items)`
- **copy_field** — read-only value with a copy button (API keys, install `ui_copy_field(value, masked)`
- **data_table** — sortable data table: header cells are buttons carrying `ui_data_table(headers, rows, sort_col, sort_asc, action)`
- **date_picker** — native date/time inputs styled to match ui_input: the `ui_date_classes(); ui_date_input(typ, name, value); ui_date(name, value); ui_datetime(name, value); ui_time(name, value); ui_range_inputs(typ, name_from, name_to, from, to); ui_date_range(name_from, name_to, from, to); ui_datetime_range(name_from, name_to, from, to)`
- **desc_list** — definition list for record details: label/value rows on `ui_desc_list(items)`
- **dialog** — modal: dimmed overlay + centered flat panel. Render it hidden `ui_dialog(id, title, body, actions, open)`
- **diff_view** — unified diff display: added lines on a green wash, removed `ui_diff_line(sign, text); ui_diff_view(lines)`
- **drawer** — slide-in side panel: dimmed overlay + full-height sheet from `ui_drawer(id, side, title, body, close_action, open)`
- **dropdown** — menu on a trigger, no JS: native <details> opens an `ui_dropdown(trigger, items)`
- **empty_state** — centered placeholder for empty lists/searches: title, `ui_empty_state(title, body, action)`
- **file_upload** — dropzone-styled file input: the whole dashed area is a `ui_file_upload(name, title, hint)`
- **footer** — quiet page footer above a hairline: left text, right link row. `ui_footer(left, labels, hrefs)`
- **form_field** — label + control + quiet help line ("" to omit). Pass any `ui_form_field(label, control, help)`
- **heatmap** — contribution-style activity grid: columns of 7 cells (weeks), `ui_heat_tint(level); ui_heatmap(values)`
- **hero** — page-opening statement: large tight title, quiet subtitle, `ui_hero(title, subtitle, actions)`
- **input** — text input: hairline border, quiet focus ring, no chrome. `ui_input_classes(); ui_input(name, typ, placeholder, value)`
- **kbd** — keystroke chip: a physical-key look for shortcuts and commands. `ui_kbd(keys); ui_kbd_combo(keys)`
- **layout** — app-shell building blocks: a full-height sidebar + content `ui_shell(sidebar, main); ui_content_classes(); ui_grid_classes(); ui_split(left, right)`
- **list_group** — bordered stack of rows separated by hairlines. Each row is `ui_list_group(items)`
- **log_view** — terminal-style log panel: dark surface, mono lines, level `ui_log_level_class(level); ui_log_line(time, level, msg); ui_log_view(id, lines)`
- **navbar** — top bar: brand left, links right, hairline bottom border. `ui_navbar(brand, labels, hrefs, active)`
- **otp_input** — segmented one-time-code boxes: n single-character numeric `ui_otp(name, n)`
- **pagination** — page switcher: prev / numbered pages / next. Buttons carry `ui_page_btn(label, arg, active, disabled); ui_pagination(current, total)`
- **popover** — click-toggled floating panel, no JS: native <details> with an `ui_popover(trigger, body)`
- **progress** — flat progress bar. `pct` is 0..100 (clamped); the fill width `ui_progress(pct)`
- **radio_group** — custom radios, no JS: sr-only native inputs drive styled `ui_radio(name, label, checked); ui_radio_group(name, options, selected)`
- **rating** — star rating: SVG stars (no emoji), filled amber up to `value`. `ui_star_svg(); ui_rating(value, max, action)`
- **section_header** — titled section opener: heading + quiet description on `ui_section_header(title, desc, action)`
- **select** — native select styled to match ui_input. `options` are the `ui_select_classes(); ui_select(name, options, selected)`
- **separator** — hairline divider, horizontal or vertical, with an optional `ui_separator(label); ui_separator_v()`
- **sidebar** — navigation column content for ui_shell: a brand block and `ui_sidebar_brand(name, tag); ui_sidebar_group(title, labels, hrefs, active)`
- **skeleton** — loading placeholder blocks (animate-pulse). Compose bars and `ui_skeleton_bar(w_class); ui_skeleton_block(extra_classes)`
- **slider** — native range input (accent-colored to the ink via inline `ui_slider(name, min, max, val, input_action); ui_slider_row(label, slot_name, initial, name, min, max, val, input_action)`
- **spinner** — quiet loading indicator: a spinning hairline arc (pure CSS, `ui_spinner()`
- **stat** — KPI tile: tiny uppercase label over a large figure, optional `ui_stat(label, value, delta)`
- **steps** — numbered progress steps: done steps are inked, the current one `ui_steps(labels, current)`
- **switch** — toggle, no JS: an sr-only checkbox (peer) drives the track color `ui_switch(name, label, on, action)`
- **table** — document-style data table: tiny uppercase header row, hairline `ui_td(cell); ui_tr(cells); ui_table(headers, rows)`
- **tabs** — underline tabs on a hairline baseline. `labels` are the tab `ui_tab_classes(is_active); ui_tabs(labels, active)`
- **textarea** — multi-line input styled to match ui_input. `rows` is the `ui_textarea(name, placeholder, rows, value)`
- **timeline** — vertical event feed on a hairline spine: dot, time, text. `ui_timeline(items)`
- **toast** — notifications. Two forms: `ui_toast_classes(kind); ui_toast(id, slot_name, kind, open); ui_toast_stack(id); ui_toast_item(msg, kind, dismiss_action, key)`
- **tooltip** — hover hint, no JS: the wrapper is a `group`, the bubble is `ui_tooltip(trigger, tip)`
- **tree** — collapsible tree (file explorers, nested data), no JS: nested `ui_tree_node(label, children); ui_tree_leaf(label); ui_tree(body)`
- **ui** — base helpers shared by every machin-web-ui component. Vendored into `ui_esc(s); ui_page_classes(); ui_main_classes(); ui_prose_classes()`

## Tailwind coverage

Implemented families: layout, spacing, sizing, inset, colors, borders, typography, flexbox, grid, backgrounds, effects, transitions, transforms, interactivity, arbitrary-values.
Not implemented: container/columns, filters (blur/brightness/...), backdrop-filters, mix-blend, will-change/content/caret/accent/scroll-snap/touch, aria-*/data-* variants, group/peer named modifiers, has-*, arbitrary properties ([color:red]) and arbitrary variants, hsl()/named-color arbitrary values, tailwind.config customization (default theme only).
Verification: differential-tested vs the tailwindcss standalone binary (oracle/check.py): rule-for-rule identical output on the full corpus

---

# AGENTS.md (full operator manual)

# machin-web-ui — operator manual for agents

You are building or editing an **isomorphic machin app** styled by
machin-web-ui. This is the manual: the build, the contracts, and the gotchas
you will hit. The binary is the source of truth — run `machin-web-ui guide`
(full JSON) or `machin-web-ui coverage` (Tailwind surface) any time.

## The journey

```sh
machin-web-ui init my-app        # SSR server + wasm client + starter components + theme.json
cd my-app && ./build.sh          # css scan -> asset embed -> wasm -> native binary
./app                            # http://localhost:48100
machin-web-ui list               # more components -> machin-web-ui add <name...>
machin-web-ui check md:bg-ink    # does a class resolve? to what CSS?
machin-web-ui coverage           # what's implemented — and what is NOT
machin-web-ui verify             # drive headless Chrome (CDP, pure MFL): render+styles+no-errors, screenshot
```

`build.sh` needs `machin`, `zig`, and `machin-web-ui` on `PATH` (or
`MACHIN=`/`MACHIN_WEB_UI=`). The shipped app binary has **zero runtime deps**.

## The five contracts

1. **Isomorphic component.** A component is one MFL function. The server calls
   it for SSR first paint; the wasm client calls the *same* function inside
   `hydrate()` and binds to matching `data-s` slots. One view, both sides, no
   flash, no drift.
2. **Clicks.** `<button data-action="bump" data-arg="0">` → the generic host
   calls `export func bump(arg)`. Add behavior = add an `export func` + a
   `data-action`. `data-input="x"` forwards input events to `export func x(v)`.
3. **Text slots.** `slot(name, fn)` emits `<span data-s="name">…</span>` and
   queues a reactive binding; `dom_patch` updates it. The SSR server renders
   the identical span so hydration reuses it.
4. **Markup re-render.** For non-text updates (rebuild a table, a calendar, a
   chip list), call `dom_mount(containerId, html)` directly from client code —
   the reactive runtime's extern is callable from your MFL.
5. **Theming.** Components speak semantic tokens — `canvas surface ink muted
   line accent` + `ok warn danger info` — each a full 50–950 ramp
   (`bg-ink`, `text-muted`, `ring-accent-500/40`, `dark:bg-canvas-950`). A
   `theme.json` remaps them (palette refs `@stone-900` or hexes `#0d9488`,
   plus `radius` and `fontSans`/`fontMono`); the default theme aliases the
   stone look. `css --theme theme.json`.

## Gotchas (these will bite)

- **Dynamic-class trap.** The scanner sees *literal* class strings only. Never
  build a class name by interpolation (`"h-[" + str(n) + "]"` is invisible to
  the scanner). For data-driven geometry use inline SVG attributes or `style=`.
- **`peer-checked:`** — the styled element must be a **sibling** of the
  `sr-only` input, never nested inside it.
- **`data-action` on a `<label>` fires twice** — a label click forwards a
  synthetic click to its wrapped input. Put the `data-action` on the input.
- **Unknown classes**: loud (`/* tw-unknown */` header) in an explicit list;
  silent in file-scan mode (Tailwind JIT semantics). `check` a class if unsure.
- **Dark mode**: media strategy by default; `css --dark-class` emits
  `:is(.dark *)` selectors so a `.dark` class on `<html>` drives a live toggle.

## Not implemented (see `coverage` for the current list)

Container queries, filters/backdrop-filters, aria/data variants, arbitrary
properties (`[color:red]`), `tailwind.config` plugins. The engine targets the
Tailwind v3.4 core surface and is differential-tested rule-for-rule against
the real `tailwindcss` binary.
